label: Python
usage: Used as the core language for ML/GenAI APIs, data pipelines, and production services.

label: PyTorch
usage: Used for model training and fine-tuning on computer vision and LLM-oriented tasks.

label: FastAPI
usage: Used to expose model and document services through robust REST APIs.

label: LangChain
usage: Used to orchestrate LLM chains and tool-based reasoning workflows.

label: RAG
usage: Used to ground responses on internal document corpora with retrieval + generation.

label: Kubernetes
usage: Used to deploy, scale, and isolate AI services across environments.

label: Docker
usage: Used to package services for reproducible local and production execution.

label: PostgreSQL
usage: Used to store metadata, task state, and structured outputs from AI pipelines.

label: Qdrant
usage: Used as vector storage for semantic search and retrieval quality in RAG use cases.

label: Whisper
usage: Used to transcribe meetings and audio streams for downstream analysis.

label: OpenCV
usage: Used for image preprocessing and vision pipelines in OCR and inspection tasks.

label: MLOps
usage: Used to monitor, version, and continuously improve model lifecycle in production.
